Special/special.bud-drugom.png.title: Be a Friend
Special/special.bud-drugom.png.text: The chosen player cannot vote against you until the end of the game.

Special/special.vzyal-s-soboy.png.title: Took It Along
Special/special.vzyal-s-soboy.png.text: Play this card only if you are eliminated. While everyone was distracted, something disappeared from the bunker. Take any revealed bunker card — it now belongs to the eliminated players.

Special/special.vklyuchil-svet.png.title: Turned On the Lights
Special/special.vklyuchil-svet.png.text: Replace any revealed bunker card with a random one from the deck.

Special/special.gromkiy-golos.png.title: Loud Voice
Special/special.gromkiy-golos.png.text: Your vote counts as two votes in this voting round.

Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-baga.title: Let's Clear Up the Baggage
Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-baga.text: Collect all revealed baggage cards from non-eliminated players, shuffle them, and redeal them.

Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-biol.title: Let's Clear Up Biology
Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-biol.text: Collect all revealed biology cards from non-eliminated players, shuffle them, and redeal them.

Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-zdor.title: Let's Clear Up Health
Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-zdor.text: Collect all revealed health cards from non-eliminated players, shuffle them, and redeal them.

Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-fakt.title: Let's Clear Up the Facts
Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-fakt.text: Collect all revealed fact cards from non-eliminated players, shuffle them, and redeal them.

Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-hobb.title: Let's Clear Up Hobbies
Special/special.davayte-na-chistotu-hobb.text: Collect all revealed hobby cards from non-eliminated players, shuffle them, and redeal them.

Special/special.diversiya.png.title: Sabotage
Special/special.diversiya.png.text: Play this card only if you are eliminated. While everyone was distracted, someone got into the bunker. Discard any revealed bunker card.

Special/special.diskreditatsiya.png.title: Discredit
Special/special.diskreditatsiya.png.text: The chosen player's vote does not count in this voting round.

Special/special.zaschiti-igroka-sleva.pn.title: Protect the Player on the Left
Special/special.zaschiti-igroka-sleva.pn.text: Keep this secret. If the nearest player on your left is eliminated, next time you must vote against yourself.

Special/special.zaschiti-igroka-sprava.p.title: Protect the Player on the Right
Special/special.zaschiti-igroka-sprava.p.text: Keep this secret. If the nearest player on your right is eliminated, next time you must vote against yourself.

Special/special.zaschiti-mladshego.png.title: Protect the Youngest
Special/special.zaschiti-mladshego.png.text: Keep this secret. If the youngest player is eliminated (among those whose age is revealed), next time you must vote against yourself.

Special/special.zaschiti-smelogo.png.title: Protect the Brave One
Special/special.zaschiti-smelogo.png.text: Keep this secret. If the player who revealed health first is eliminated, next time you must vote against yourself.

Special/special.zaschiti-starshego.png.title: Protect the Oldest
Special/special.zaschiti-starshego.png.text: Keep this secret. If the oldest player is eliminated (among those whose age is revealed), next time you must vote against yourself.

Special/special.kompromat.png.title: Compromising Evidence
Special/special.kompromat.png.text: Votes against the chosen player are doubled in this voting round, but you do not vote yourself. (your vote is canceled)

Special/special.mne-nuzhnee.png.title: I Need It More
Special/special.mne-nuzhnee.png.text: Take a baggage card from any player. The affected player draws 1 more special condition card from the deck.

Special/special.molchanie.png.title: Silence
Special/special.molchanie.png.text: No one may speak for the rest of this round until the vote. Gestures and pantomime are allowed.

Special/special.obmen-kart-bagazh.png.title: Swap Baggage Cards
Special/special.obmen-kart-bagazh.png.text: Swap revealed “Baggage” cards with the nearest player on your left or right.

Special/special.obmen-kart-biologiya.png.title: Swap Biology Cards
Special/special.obmen-kart-biologiya.png.text: Swap revealed “Biology” cards with the nearest player on your left or right.

Special/special.obmen-kart-zdorove.png.title: Swap Health Cards
Special/special.obmen-kart-zdorove.png.text: Swap revealed “Health” cards with the nearest player on your left or right.

Special/special.obmen-kart-faktov.png.title: Swap Fact Cards
Special/special.obmen-kart-faktov.png.text: Swap revealed “Facts” cards with the nearest player on your left or right.

Special/special.obmen-kart-hobbi.png.title: Swap Hobby Cards
Special/special.obmen-kart-hobbi.png.text: Swap revealed “Hobby” cards with the nearest player on your left or right.

Special/special.plan-b.png.title: Plan B
Special/special.plan-b.png.text: Everyone must vote again, choosing a different candidate.

Special/special.prosrochennye-tabletki.p.title: Expired Pills
Special/special.prosrochennye-tabletki.p.text: Replace any player's revealed health card with a random one from the deck.

Special/special.pryamoy-vopros.png.title: Direct Question
Special/special.pryamoy-vopros.png.text: Choose a card type. Until the end of the round, on their turn everyone must reveal a card of that type if it is not already revealed.

Special/special.taynaya-ugroza.png.title: Secret Threat
Special/special.taynaya-ugroza.png.text: Play this card only if you are eliminated. A gang of marauders has learned about the bunker. In the finale this card becomes an additional threat for those inside the bunker: they must defend themselves or negotiate.

Special/special.feykovyy-diplom.png.title: Fake Diploma
Special/special.feykovyy-diplom.png.text: Replace any player's revealed profession card with a random one from the deck.

Special/special.horoshie-tabletki.png.title: Good Pills
Special/special.horoshie-tabletki.png.text: Discard any player's revealed health card.

dev-choice.title: Special Condition Test
dev-choice.text: Choose any special condition for testing. After use, the DEV card becomes available again.
